sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97489" key="subwtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῠβωτ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n97489.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for a swineherd</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μέλος</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">swineherd's</tr_> song, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:21:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21.1</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.776e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
